Package com.saperion.ngc.iform.xml

Class TabListType

java.lang.Object
com.saperion.ngc.iform.xml.TabListType
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class TabListType extends Object implements Serializable

Java class for TabListType complex type.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class. 

 <complexType name="TabListType">
   <complexContent>
     <restriction base="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}anyType">
       <sequence>
         <element name="font" type="{http://www.saperion.com/NGXMLSchema}fontType" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="pos" type="{http://www.saperion.com/NGXMLSchema}posType"/>
         <element name="tabCnt" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int"/>
         <element name="requiredRights" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}long"/>
         <element name="tabs" type="{http://www.saperion.com/NGXMLSchema}TabType" maxOccurs="unbounded"/>
         <element name="title" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="tabPosition" type="{http://www.saperion.com/NGXMLSchema}tabPositionType"/>
       </sequence>
     </restriction>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>

    • getTabs

      public List<TabType> getTabs()
      Gets the value of the tabs property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the JAXB object. This is why there is not a set method for the tabs property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

          getTabs().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list TabType

    • getTitle
